welcomeMessage: I'm the DealSignal AI assistant. Once a model is connected, I can help you interpret document heat, recommend next actions, and explain visitor behavior. Current replies use demo logic and do not reference real names or numbers.

suggestions.highHeatSignals: What high-heat signals are there today?
suggestions.documentRisks: What are the key risk points in this document?
suggestions.linkSecurity: How can I improve link security?

inputPlaceholder: Ask about signals, action suggestions, or security settings...

search.results: Here are the most relevant passages for "{{query}}":
search.noResults: No relevant passages found for "{{query}}" in this document.
search.error: Sorry, the search failed. Please try again later.

evidence.title: Evidence & source location
evidence.jumpAlert: Jump to page {{pageNumber}} and highlight the source

viewer.title: AI Assistant
viewer.emptyExample: e.g. What is this company's gross margin?

resetDialog.title: Reset conversation
resetDialog.description: Are you sure you want to clear the current conversation? This cannot be undone.

replies.heatAnalysis: I'll analyze this document's access data to surface visitors with long dwell times and repeat visits as engagement signals.
replies.securityAdvice: I can review this link's permissions and suggest stronger settings for sensitive materials.
replies.followUpAction: Based on highly engaged visitors and their interaction history, I can suggest follow-ups like sending more materials or booking a meeting.
replies.default: Got it. Once the model is connected, I'll generate explainable answers based on real documents and access data.
